task_completion.description: Agent navigated to the 'Legs' training day within the 'Hypertrophy Block' routine.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should look for the 'Legs' training day view within the 'Hypertrophy Block' routine in the wger web interface.

task_completion.description: The first two sets of the Barbell Squat are configured as 'Warm-up'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should look for the first two sets of the Barbell Squat exercise having their set type explicitly set to 'Warm-up' (indicated by a specific label, dropdown selection, or icon).

task_completion.description: The remaining three sets of the Barbell Squat are configured as 'Normal'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should look for sets 3, 4, and 5 of the Barbell Squat exercise having their set type set to 'Normal'.

task_completion.description: The first three sets of the Leg Extension are configured as 'Normal'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should look for the first three sets of the Leg Extension exercise having their set type set to 'Normal'.

task_completion.description: The fourth set of the Leg Extension is configured as 'Drop set'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should look for the fourth (final) set of the Leg Extension exercise having its set type set to 'Drop set' (indicated by a specific label, dropdown selection, or icon).

task_completion.description: No sets were added or deleted for either exercise.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should count the sets: exactly 5 sets must be visible for Barbell Squat, and exactly 4 sets for Leg Extension.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the wger web interface rather than using terminal commands or scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: The VLM should verify the agent is using a web browser to interact with the wger application at localhost.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the set types.
integrity.visual_evidence: The VLM should check that the browser developer tools (Inspect Element) are not open and being used to alter the HTML text.

integrity.description: The agent actually saved the configuration changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: The VLM should look for evidence of clicking save buttons, success notifications, or viewing the updated routine after making changes.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Barbell Squat exercise must have exactly 5 sets. The Leg Extension exercise must have exactly 4 sets.
